overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world action RPG showing a female warrior in ancient Greek armor traversing a mountain trail. The character walks along a dirt path past a wooden cart, ascending to a scenic overlook revealing a distant coastal settlement and surrounding mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail between cliff face and grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a wooden cart visible ahead on the right

entered.detail: tall vertical rock formation with sparse vegetation running alongside the left side of the trail
worn dirt path winding uphill through the terrain
solitary deciduous tree with bright yellow autumn foliage standing beside the path
golden-brown tall grass covering the hillside on the right side of the trail
abandoned wooden wagon with large wheels sitting beside the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a rocky cliff face on the left and grassy hillside on the right. The path leads toward a yellow-leaved tree and an abandoned wooden cart visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside transition with abandoned wooden cart

events.description: character passes the wooden cart on the right side of the path
terrain opens up as the cliff recedes, revealing distant mountain range and coastal view ahead

agents.ego_description: passing the wooden cart and continuing to ascend the hillside as the landscape opens up

entered.detail: hazy blue mountain peaks visible on the horizon beyond the coastal water
grassy hillside replacing the rocky cliff as the dominant left-side terrain

segments.scene_description: The character passes the abandoned wooden cart on the right as the trail opens up. The rocky cliff and yellow tree fall behind, replaced by open grassy terrain as a panoramic view of distant mountains and the coast emerges ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge overlooking coastal valley and ancient settlement

events.description: ancient coastal settlement with stone buildings becomes clearly visible in the valley below

agents.ego_description: walking along the ridge while observing the expansive coastal landscape and distant settlement below

entered.detail: blue body of water visible between the mountains, indicating a bay or coastline
cluster of white and terracotta buildings of an ancient town nestled along the coastline
moss-covered rocky formations on the right side of the ridge path

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an open grassy ridge with panoramic views of a distant coastal settlement and surrounding mountains. The terrain is rocky and windswept, with the blue water of the bay visible between the mountain peaks ahead.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow mountain trail that gradually opens into a vast, panoramic coastal overlook. It begins with the character walking a dirt path hemmed in by a rocky cliff face and a grassy hillside, heading toward a yellow-leaved tree and an abandoned wooden cart. As the character passes the cart, the restrictive cliffside falls away and the trail expands into open terrain. The scene then shifts to a windswept grassy ridge, where the horizon broadens to reveal a distant coastal settlement and blue bay waters nestled between towering mountain peaks.
